final:
module otsu_threshold(
    input [7:0] pixel_value,
    input [7:0] threshold,
    output reg binary_output
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (pixel_value > threshold) begin
            binary_output = 1;
        end else begin
            binary_output = 0;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      binary_output <= ~pixel_value; if (threshold == 8'hFF) begin binary_output <= 1; end
    end
  end

endmodule
